step_1_image_prompt: A 25-year-old Mediterranean woman with sun-kissed deep-tan skin, green almond eyes, and brunette-with-blonde-balayage waves to her mid-back, captured in a candid amateur smartphone snapshot with natural skin texture and visible pores. She is wearing a long ivory waffle-knit robe tied loosely at the waist, sleeves pushed up to her elbows, the robe falling to mid-shin, a white spaghetti-strap camisole visible at the V-neckline, hair damp and slicked back into a low loose bun, small gold studs, bare face with dewy fresh-shower skin. She stands in a bedroom corner near a large window on the left, a wooden chair with a folded cashmere throw draped over it, a small green plant in a ceramic pot beside the chair, warm wood floor underfoot. Standing in three-quarter angle to the camera, weight on her right leg, one foot slightly forward, looking softly downward with a calm content smile. Both hands are visible in the frame, not in her pockets, not behind her back, not cropped out of frame. Her right hand rests at her side, her left hand rests at her left hip gently touching the robe sash. Soft cool morning daylight from the large window on the left, balanced diffuse wash across her face and the robe, gentle cool-neutral tone throughout. Shot on iPhone 15 Pro 35mm equivalent. Real photograph, not AI-generated, no model pose, candid moment. Post-shower fresh calm beginning mood, palette of ivory waffle, warm wood, sage green plant, soft daylight white. Reference image is the persona — preserve her face, eye color, eye shape, brow shape, nose shape, lip shape, jaw line, and hair color exactly. Do not improvise her face.

fal_pulid_params.negative_prompt: extra limbs, deformed hands, mutated hands, bad anatomy, lowres, blurry, watermark, text, signature, extra fingers, fused fingers, distorted face, asymmetric eyes, unnatural skin texture, plastic skin, AI-generated look, model pose, perfect symmetry, smooth airbrushed skin, glossy plastic skin, illustration, 3D render, CGI, doll-like features, magazine retouching

step_2_brief.intended_grip_or_placement: Right hand at chest level, thumb on the front face of the box, four fingers wrapping around the back edge, box held vertically (long side vertical) with the front face directly toward the camera.
step_2_brief.intended_product_position: Step 2 will adjust her right arm to raise from her side to chest level and reshape her hand into a vertical-orientation grip — thumb on the front face, four fingers wrapping the back edge, box rotated so the long side is vertical. This is a non-standard rotation (most scenarios use horizontal); Step 2 must explicitly call out vertical orientation.

id_weight_recommendation.reasoning: id_weight at fal API cap (1.0). true_cfg at default 1.5 — medium full mid-thigh-up framing where face is mid-importance, default is sufficient alongside the major outfit override (waffle robe vs reference athletic wear) and slicked-back damp hair styling change.
